## Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `/update-all-plugins` (or `/update-mcp-servers` or `/update-extensions`)
2. With these flags: `--flag value`
3. Observe: ...

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened (include error output if any).

## Environment
- OS: [macOS / Linux / Windows]
- Node.js version: `node --version`
- Claude Code version:
- Which command: [update-all-plugins / update-mcp-servers / update-extensions]
- Which tool: [Cursor / Cline / Roo Code / Windsurf / N/A]
